assertions.title: CLI entrypoint grist-mill is installed and runnable

steps.expected: Usage output with subcommands run, validate, list
steps.observed: Usage printed with Commands: export, list, optimize, report, run, tasks, validate. Subcommands run, validate, list are all present.

assertions.title: CLI validate subcommand checks config without executing

steps.observed: Exit 0. Output: 'Configuration is valid: configs/examples/smoke.yaml' with agent, environment, task count (2), and artifact count (0).
Exit 1. Output: 'Error: 2 validation errors for GristMillConfig' with field-specific errors for agent.model and agent.provider.

assertions.title: CLI list subcommand shows registered artifacts

steps.expected: Print registered artifacts with type and name
steps.observed: Exit 0. Output: 'No artifacts registered.' with guidance to register via config. When artifacts are defined in config and loaded, they would be listed. The command itself works correctly.

assertions.title: CLI supports --dry-run to preview execution without running tasks

steps.expected: Resolved experiment matrix printed, no execution
steps.observed: Exit 0. Output shows dry_run: true, full agent config, environment config, task matrix with 2 entries (smoke-echo-pass, smoke-echo-fail), and total_tasks: 2. No container/process execution occurred.

assertions.title: CLI handles missing config file gracefully

steps.expected: Exit code 1 with friendly error, no traceback
steps.observed: Exit 1. Output: 'Error: Configuration file not found: nonexistent.yaml'. No Python traceback in output.

assertions.title: CLI respects verbose and quiet flags

steps.observed: Exit 0. Output includes 'DEBUG: grist_mill.config:' lines showing field-level config resolution with source annotations (from YAML).

steps.expected: Output suppressed to WARNING and above
steps.observed: Exit 0. No DEBUG lines in output, only the structured dry-run output (which is stdout, not logging).
Exit 0. No DEBUG lines, only structured output at default INFO level.
Exit 2. Output: 'Error: Invalid value: --verbose and --quiet are mutually exclusive.'

steps.action: Verify uv sync succeeds (implicit via uv run working)
steps.observed: uv run executes without any dependency errors. All 28 CLI tests pass.

summary: Tested 7 assertions: all 7 passed. VAL-CLI-01 (help/subcommands), VAL-CLI-03 (validate), VAL-CLI-04 (list artifacts), VAL-CLI-05 (dry-run), VAL-CLI-07 (missing config graceful error), VAL-CLI-08 (verbose/quiet flags), VAL-PKG-01 (version/install). All 28 pytest CLI tests also pass.
